title: The Big Data Analytics Process: From Raw Data to Actionable Insights
description: This flowchart visualizes the end-to-end process of Big Data Analytics, illustrating how raw, unstructured data from various sources is transformed into valuable insights that drive decision-making.
relationships: Data flows from Sources to Ingestion
Ingested data is stored for Processing
Processed data is analyzed for patterns
Analysis results are visualized for clarity
Visualizations lead to Insights for business decisions
